variants: Linae Winters is currently a resident of Sanderling Steps, although she was born in Emberpike Flats. Her remarkable work has led her to receive the Garnet Shard Token, an honor that acknowledges her contributions to her field. Among her notable achievements is the authored work titled Kelpie Node Expansion, which has made waves in her area of expertise. Additionally, Linae is an active participant in the Candlelit Historians Fellowship, where she enthusiastically engages with fellow history enthusiasts.
